schemes.name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
schemes.benefit: Rs 20,050 crore investment — subsidies on boats, nets, ice plants, cold chains for fishers
schemes.benefit_hi: मछुआरों को नाव, जाल, बर्फ संयंत्र, कोल्ड चेन पर सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: Fishermen, fish farmers, SHGs, cooperatives, entrepreneurs in fisheries

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card for Fisheries
schemes.benefit: Short-term credit up to Rs 2 lakh at 4% interest for working capital in fishing
schemes.benefit_hi: मत्स्य कार्यशील पूंजी के लिए 4% ब्याज पर ₹2 लाख ऋण
schemes.eligibility: Fishermen, fish farmers, marine fishing boat owners

schemes.name: Fishermen Accident & Life Insurance Scheme
schemes.benefit: Rs 5 lakh life cover + Rs 2.5 lakh disability cover at annual premium of Rs 19 only
schemes.benefit_hi: मात्र ₹19 वार्षिक प्रीमियम पर ₹5 लakh जीवन + ₹2.5 लाख विकलांगता बीमा
schemes.eligibility: Active fishermen aged 18-70 with fisherman ID card

schemes.name: Blue Revolution (Integrated Development of Fisheries)
schemes.benefit: Subsidies for aquaculture, inland fisheries, mariculture, seaweed, ornamental fish cultivation
schemes.benefit_hi: जलकृषि, अंतर्देशीय मत्स्यपालन, समुद्री शैवाल, सजावटी मछली पर सब्सिडी

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Saha-Yojana (PM-MKSSY)
schemes.benefit: Formalization of fisheries sector — micro-enterprise credit + income + crop insurance for fish farmers
schemes.benefit_hi: मछली कृषकों के लिए सूक्ष्म ऋण, आय सहायता, बीमा
schemes.eligibility: Small-scale fish farmers, indigenous fishers, SHGs in fisheries

schemes.name: Fisheries Development Revolving Fund
schemes.benefit: Low-interest revolving loans for deep-sea fishing vessels, equipment upgradation
schemes.benefit_hi: गहरे समुद्र में मछली पकड़ने के जहाजों, उपकरण उन्नयन के लिए कम ब्याज ऋण

schemes.name: National Fisheries Development Board (NFDB) Grants
schemes.benefit: Grants for fish seed production, cold storage, processing plants, ornamental fisheries units
schemes.benefit_hi: मत्स्य बीज, कोल्ड स्टोरेज, प्रसंस्करण संयंत्र, सजावटी मात्स्यिकी को अनुदान
schemes.eligibility: Fish farmers, entrepreneurs, state fisheries departments

schemes.name: Ban Period Relief (Fishing Ban Compensation)
schemes.benefit: Rs 4,000-6,000/month financial relief to marine fishermen during 45-60 day fishing ban
schemes.benefit_hi: मछली पकड़ने पर 45-60 दिन के प्रतिबंध के दौरान ₹4,000-6,000/माह राहत
schemes.eligibility: Active marine fishermen in coastal states during monsoon ban period

schemes.name: Seaweed Cultivation Mission
schemes.benefit: Training + equipment support + buyback guarantee for seaweed farmers in coastal areas
schemes.benefit_hi: तटीय क्षेत्रों में शैवाल किसानों को प्रशिक्षण + उपकरण + बायबैक गारंटी
schemes.eligibility: Coastal fishermen willing to take up seaweed cultivation

schemes.name: Cold Chain / Ice Plant Subsidy
schemes.benefit: 40-60% subsidy on ice plants, refrigerated fish vans, cold storage for fishermen cooperatives
schemes.benefit_hi: मछुआरा सहकारी समितियों को बर्फ संयंत्र, रेफ्रिजरेटेड वैन, कोल्ड स्टोरेज पर 40-60% सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: Fishermen cooperatives, SHGs, entrepreneurs in fisheries supply chain
